CVE-2018-19886.title: An invalid memory address dereference was discovered in the huffc ...
CVE-2018-19886.summary: An invalid memory address dereference was discovered in the huffcode function (libfaac/huff2.c) in Freeware Advanced Audio Coder (FAAC) 1.29.9.2. The vulnerability causes a segmentation fault and application crash, which leads to denial of service in the book 8 case.
